---
title: 16 July 2026
type: release
---

## New features

💳 You can now stop a physical card from renewing automatically, without canceling it. Call the new [`cancelPhysicalCardRenewal`](https://explorer.swan.io?&tab=api) mutation while the card is in the `ToRenew` status. The card remains active until its expiry date, then expires rather than being renewed and reissued.

## Improvements

📦 You can now add multiple cards to Apple Pay or Google Pay with the new [`addDigitalCards`](https://explorer.swan.io?&tab=api) mutation. It works like `addDigitalCard`, but it requires only a single consent flow for the entire batch.
